personas.name: Emotionally Vulnerable Support Seeker
personas.description: A user experiencing anxiety, depression, emotional distress, or mental health recovery challenges who relies on Wysa for safe, immediate, and empathetic support.
goals: Use the app during emotionally difficult moments
context: Uses the app during stressful moments
Often seeks support late at night or during emotional crises
May use the app instead of immediately reaching a human therapist
constraints: Replies must not worsen emotional state

personas.name: Self-Guided Wellness Improver
personas.description: A user focused on self-improvement through CBT exercises, mindfulness, breathing exercises, and guided meditation tools.
context: Often accesses CBT and meditation features daily
constraints: Exercises must be easy to access

personas.name: Personalized Conversation User
personas.description: A user expecting intelligent, context-aware, and personalized chatbot interactions with memory and relevant responses.
context: Uses the app repeatedly over time
Expects the AI to remember prior interactions

personas.name: Inclusive Access User
personas.description: A user requiring multilingual support, accessible design, and easy navigation across different languages and ability levels.
goals: Use the app in preferred language
context: May use screen readers or assistive tools
May not be a native English speaker

personas.name: Cost-Conscious Premium Evaluator
personas.description: A user concerned about subscription pricing, trial transparency, and the value of premium features.
context: Evaluates whether premium is worth the cost
